title: Neon+
body:
This modpack is meant for people who like the vanilla experience but want better performance and some quality of life features on an optimized mod loader (Fabric)

Main menu

![Main Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b8accbbc4fcbc798ad7e69e787ac1caa77cabfc.png)

Did you know this pack comes with a default server list

![Default Server List](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15d018b0745c174fa5c26814e0779a38639e378f.png)

And [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/)

![Vanilla Tweaks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4131374e85dd8ba519f0508e80ec6b3ed65b39c2.png)

Here is the Modlist

![Modlist](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75f27b1014c23b15462a93e21011ed48026e50e1.png)
